title: Cosmos Graph · Orbital — identity as a sun, memories orbit concentric rings at their own speed
title_vi: Cosmos Graph · Orbital — Ra là mặt trời, ký ức quay trên vành đồng tâm với tốc độ riêng
summary: A solar-system graph: identity is a glowing sun at the centre, memory/card bodies orbit on concentric rings at their own speeds, each wired to the sun. Hover a body to light it. Elegant and structured. Self-contained Canvas 2D.
usage_notes: RUN: open file. TECHNIQUES: each body has ring radius + angular speed; faint elliptical rings; sun = radial-gradient glow; connectors to centre brighten on hover. THEME: Ra = sun + memory/card labels. Reference for the diary-view Graph facet.
summary_vi: Đồ thị kiểu hệ mặt trời: Ra là mặt trời ở tâm, các ký ức/card quay trên vành đồng tâm với tốc độ riêng, mỗi cái nối về tâm. Hover để sáng. Sang, có trật tự. Canvas 2D tự chứa.
notes: Graph effect sample (Ra) for the diary-view Graph facet. repo cosmos-akashic-effects/web-templates/diary-concepts/graph-effects/2-orbital.html
